hero.title: Your pet's social life starts here.
hero.subtitle: Find playmates, track adventures, and discover pet-friendly places, all in one app.

benefits.title: Why Choose PawCult?
benefits.subtitle: Transform your pet's life with meaningful connections and endless adventures
benefits.healthierPetsDesc: Regular socialization and exercise keep your pet physically and mentally stimulated.
benefits.buildCommunityDesc: Connect with fellow pet parents in your neighborhood and create lasting friendships.
benefits.discoverPlacesDesc: Find pet-friendly locations, parks, and businesses near you that welcome your furry friend.
benefits.neverMissAdventuresDesc: Get notified about local pet events, playdates, and activities happening around you.

features.title: Everything Your Pet Needs
features.subtitle: From finding playmates to discovering new adventures, PawCult has all the tools to enrich your pet's social life
features.petMapDesc: Discover pet-friendly locations, see where other pets are playing, and find the perfect spots for adventures.
features.socialNetworkDesc: Connect with other pet parents, arrange playdates, and build a community around your furry friends.
features.eventPlanningDesc: Organize group walks, pet parties, and training sessions. Never miss out on local pet events.
features.petProfilesDesc: Create detailed profiles for your pets, track their adventures, and share their personalities.
features.adventureLoggingDesc: Document your pet's adventures with photos and stories. Create lasting memories of your journeys together.
features.smartNotificationsDesc: Stay updated with playdate requests, nearby events, and activities tailored to your pet's interests.

featureShowcase.title: Meet Other Pet Parents
featureShowcase.subtitle: Our interactive map helps you discover nearby pets and organize playdates with just a few taps
featureShowcase.discoverDesc: See which pets are nearby and available for playdates. Our map shows you real-time locations of active pet parents in your neighborhood, making it easy to coordinate spontaneous meetups or planned activities.
featureShowcase.discoverFeature1: Real-time location sharing with privacy controls
featureShowcase.discoverFeature2: Filter by pet type, size, and personality
featureShowcase.connectDesc: Once you've found compatible pets nearby, easily coordinate meetups through our built-in messaging system. Plan pack walks, puppy playdates, or visit pet-friendly venues together.
featureShowcase.connectFeature1: Direct messaging with other pet parents
featureShowcase.connectFeature3: Share photos and updates from your adventures

problemSolution.title: The Pet Parent Struggle is Real
problemSolution.subtitle: We understand the challenges you face in keeping your pet happy and social
problemSolution.problem1Desc: Many pets lack social interaction, leading to behavioral issues and boredom.
problemSolution.problem2Desc: Finding time to socialize pets and discover new activities is challenging.
problemSolution.problem3Desc: Pet parents struggle to find reliable information about pet-friendly places and events.
problemSolution.solution1Desc: Build a network of pet friends and arrange regular social activities.
problemSolution.solution2Desc: Easily organize and join pet activities with just a few taps.
problemSolution.solution3Desc: Access a complete database of pet-friendly locations and upcoming events.
problemSolution.ctaTitle: Ready to Transform Your Pet's Life?
problemSolution.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of happy pet parents who've already made the switch

finalCta.title: Your Pet's Best Life Starts Today
finalCta.subtitle: Join the community that's revolutionizing how pets connect, play, and explore the world together
finalCta.freeToUse: Free to use • No credit card required

appShowcase.title: See the app in action
appShowcase.subtitle: Get a glimpse of how PawCult makes connecting with other pet parents effortless

footer.description: Connecting pets and their families through meaningful social experiences, adventures, and community support.
